Thanks for your contribution! A few things that make reviews faster:
- Keep PRs focused — one gotcha per PR, one script fix per PR
- Update CHANGELOG.md under [Unreleased]
- If you added a gotcha, link the related issue
-->

<!-- Plain-English summary. One paragraph. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] 📖 Documentation (guide, cheatsheet, README)
- [ ] 🐛 Script bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Script robustness improvement (not new features — see CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] 🎯 New gotcha added to the guide

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if this PR is user-visible)
- [ ] For script changes: `PSScriptAnalyzer` passes locally (`Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path scripts/`)
- [ ] For doc changes: spell-checked and links tested
- [ ] I am the original author of this content OR I have permission to contribute it under the project's MIT license
